# BetaAppClipInvocationLocalizationInlineCreate.Relationships

**Object**

The relationships to other resources that you can set when you create a new Beta App Clip Invocation Localization Inline Creates resource.

## Declaration

```swift
object BetaAppClipInvocationLocalizationInlineCreate.Relationships
```

## Objects

- **BetaAppClipInvocationLocalizationInlineCreate.Relationships.BetaAppClipInvocation**: The relationship to the Beta App Clip Invocations resource you can set when you create a Beta App Clip Invocation Localizations resource.

## Objects

- **BetaAppClipInvocationLocalizationInlineCreate.Attributes**: The attributes that describe a Beta App Clip Invocation Localization Inline Creates resource.
